mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_APPROVAL_REQUESTS.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO APPROVAL_REQUESTS ( request_type_code, requester_admin_id, target_id, status_code, request_comment, requested_at ) VALUES ( #{requestTypeCode}, #{requesterAdminId}, #{targetId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 'PENDING', #{requestComment, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE APPROVAL_REQUESTS SET status_code = #{statusCode}, completed_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE approval_id = #{approvalId}
UPDATE APPROVAL_LINES SET status_code = #{statusCode}, comment_text = #{commentText, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approved_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE approval_line_id = #{approvalLineId}
